signal: Ozi fleet orchestration runs from the hub, not individual spokes or framework. Hub reads spoke registry, health-scans fleet, dispatches spoke-level worker subagents. Workers dispatch implementation subagents in worktree isolation. Local cron (not RemoteTrigger) because the gardener needs filesystem access to all spoke paths.
rationale: Establishes the canonical Ozi architecture: hub=orchestrator, spokes=workers, framework=protocol authority. Separation of concerns prevents framework from becoming an executor.
